utterances.speaker: Kori
utterances.text: I can not believe that Ross is gone . It is just so sad .

emotion_cause.span: 1_Ross is gone . It is just so sad .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I did not know Ross and you were so close .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I did not know Ross and you were so close .

utterances.speaker: Kori
utterances.text: We were not but we had one class together . He was such a great guy and he talked so passionately about science . I always remembered him .

emotion_cause.span: 1_Ross is gone . It is just so sad .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am sure that would mean a lot to him .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And if heaven has a door , I am sure he is pressing his ear up against it and listening intently .

utterances.speaker: Kori
utterances.text: I thought so many times about calling him and asking him out . I guess I really missed my chance .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I guess I really missed my chance .
6_I thought so many times about calling him and asking him out .
6_I thought so many times about calling him and asking him out .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Kori , I know this is a big surprise for you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is a long story but the things you just said really made my day !

emotion_cause.span: 10_the things you just said really made my day !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean , the fact that you are here means more to me than if this room were filled with people !

emotion_cause.span: 11_the fact that you are here means more to me than if this room were filled with people !

utterances.speaker: Kori
utterances.text: You sick freak , who does that ? I can not believe I had a crush on you !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Did you hear that ? Kori Weston had a crush on me ! !

emotion_cause.span: 13_Kori Weston had a crush on me ! !
